description: World Cards for Era III. One is revealed at the start of Era III, applying a global passive effect during the war against Dhakhan.

cards.name: Vientos de Guerra
cards.flavorText: El aliento de Tyr sopla sobre todos los ejércitos libres.
cards.flavorText_en: Tyr's breath blows over every free army.
cards.mechanicalText: Todas las unidades de los jugadores (no Wrought) ganan +1 ataque permanentemente.
cards.mechanicalText_en: All player units (not Wrought) gain +1 attack permanently.

cards.name: La Cornucopia
cards.flavorText: Los graneros rebosan incluso mientras los cuervos giran en el cielo.
cards.flavorText_en: Granaries overflow even as the ravens circle above.
cards.mechanicalText: Cada jugador recibe 5 monedas de oro al inicio de la Era III.
cards.mechanicalText_en: Each player receives 5 gold at the start of Era III.

cards.name: El Grito de Guerra
cards.flavorText: Un solo grito cruza las colinas y cada espada responde.
cards.flavorText_en: A single cry crosses the hills and every sword answers.
cards.mechanicalText: Cada jugador recibe una unidad de infantería gratis en su capital al inicio de la Era III.
cards.mechanicalText_en: Each player gets a free infantry unit in their capital at the start of Era III.
